purpose: Record the first integrated TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 Flash S4096 smoke where compressed layers enter sparse shared-KV attention instead of the dense fallback while MORI+AITER routed padded MoE is enabled.

attention_backend.read: This selects the experimental shared latent-KV sparse MLA path for compressed layers and the opt-in Triton tl.dot deferred LI-KL backend. It is still not the final fused sparse MLA/LI/compressor backward.

check_config.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 CANARY_GBS=4 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot MASTER_PORT=29575 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh check-config

run.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_sharedkv_likl_4x_s4096_gbs4_steps1_20260602T000000 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 CANARY_GBS=4 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot MASTER_PORT=29575 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

read: This is correctness-first integrated sparse-attention evidence at tiny GBS=4. It proves the S4096 TorchTitan compressed layers can execute the shared-KV sparse path with nonzero LI gradients and coexist with MORI+AITER routed padded MoE. It is not target throughput evidence; the full GBS64/128 sparse path and final fused sparse MLA/LI/compressor backward remain pending.
